title: dioscorea scabra var. aspera
intro: Dioscorea scabra var. aspera, also known as Chinese wild yam, is a species of flowering plant in the yam family Dioscoreaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-cancer effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestive health, and boosting the immune system. Dioscorea scabra var. aspera can be prepared as a decoction, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
